goal.statement: Increase storage access efficiency per footprint area

hypothesis.statement: With valid boundary and combination, access efficiency should improve

basis.primary: 一级组按照失败规则集合划分；失败规则集合相同即同组。
basis.secondary: 二级组在一级组内按照结构签名划分：(cells_per_layer, supported_cells/unsupported_cells, projection_ratio_bin)。

primary_groups.label: PASS | 全部规则通过
primary_groups.description: 一级组依据：失败规则集合为空（所有规则通过）

primary_groups.label: FAIL | B2 固定占地 + 效率目标
primary_groups.description: 一级组依据：失败规则集合=B2, EFF

primary_groups.label: FAIL | B2 固定占地
primary_groups.description: 一级组依据：失败规则集合=B2

primary_groups.label: FAIL | 效率目标
primary_groups.description: 一级组依据：失败规则集合=EFF

reasons: base footprint must exactly match configured area
